title: ephedra regeliana
intro: Ephedra regeliana, also known as joint pine or Siberian ephedra, is a type of flowering plant in the Ephedraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant contains ephedrine and pseudoephedrine, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and bronchodilatory effects. The health benefits of Ephedra regeliana include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as potential anti-fatigue and weight loss effects. In traditional medicine, Ephedra regeliana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or in the form of a tincture or capsule, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
